description:
## Background

Beadsmith's native logging policy sends release logs only to the OS-managed LogDir. The production Beadwork issue adapter currently emits command diagnostics through `eprintln!`, including the explicit Workspace path. This bypasses the configured release logging policy and exposes Workspace paths through unmanaged stderr.

## What to build

Route production Workspace issue-command diagnostics through Beadsmith's configured native logging path, preserving useful operational diagnostics without emitting Workspace paths to release stderr.

## Technical Approach

- Replace adapter `eprintln!` calls with the project's logging facade/macros at suitable levels.
- Keep command-view labels, counts, and classified failures useful for diagnosis while avoiding full Workspace filesystem paths in routine release messages.
- Retain unit-testable adapter behavior: logging must not alter command construction, explicit cwd threading, error classification, or returned issue data.
- Align comments and any logging initialization assumptions with `src-tauri/src/lib.rs`'s debug/release policy.

## Considerations

- Debug builds may continue to show logs through the configured stdout target; the requirement is that release builds do not bypass the plugin through direct stderr output.
- Do not log raw issue content, command output, or sensitive paths merely to replace the existing message.
- This is independent of Workspace persistence work.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Production issue adapter code contains no `eprintln!` diagnostics for Workspace commands.
- [ ] Diagnostics use the configured logging facility and preserve actionable command/view failure classification.
- [ ] Routine release command logs do not include the full Workspace path.
- [ ] Explicit command cwd behavior and adapter results are unchanged.

## Test Plan

- Update/add focused tests where logging abstraction permits; retain adapter command-contract tests.
- Run `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`, `cargo fmt --check`, and repository static checks.
title: Route Workspace command diagnostics through native logging
